wallet.noWallets: No wallets found on this USB drive.

wallet.createOrImport: Create or import a wallet to get started.
wallet.createOrImportToStart: Create or import a wallet to get started.
wallet.maxLimitReached: ⚠️ Maximum wallet limit reached (10 wallets). Please delete a wallet before creating a new one.
wallet.approachingLimit: ⚠️ Approaching wallet limit: {{current}} of {{limit}} wallets created.
wallet.nameTooLong: Wallet name must be 50 characters or less
wallet.deviceLimitReached: Device wallet limit reached ({{current}}/{{limit}}). Please upgrade to Pro or bind NFTs to this device in Settings → Membership.
wallet.discardCreationMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to cancel? All entered information will be lost.
wallet.upgradePromptMessage: You have reached your wallet limit ({{current}}/{{limit}}). {{suggestion}}
wallet.purchaseMoreNfts: Purchase additional ArcSign Pro NFTs to increase your limit (+3 wallets per NFT).
wallet.upgradeToPro: Upgrade to ArcSign Pro to increase your limit (+3 wallets per NFT).
wallet.importFailed: Failed to import wallet. Please try again.
wallet.overwriteNotImplemented: Overwrite functionality not yet implemented. Please use a different mnemonic.
wallet.duplicateWalletMessage: A wallet with this mnemonic already exists on your USB drive. Importing it again will overwrite the existing wallet data.
wallet.duplicateWalletConfirm: Are you sure you want to continue?
wallet.discardImportMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to cancel? All entered information will be lost.

address.addressOnly: Address only - Use external wallets for transactions
address.searchPlaceholder: Search by symbol, name, or address...
address.noAddressesFound: No addresses found for this wallet.
address.noMatchingAddresses: No addresses match your search or filter criteria.

membership.upgradeToProDescription: Upgrade to Pro for +3 wallets per NFT and premium features!
membership.membershipDescription: Your Pro membership is calculated from NFTs across all your BSC addresses. Each NFT adds 3 wallets to your limit.
membership.selectAddressToMint: Select an address to mint a Pro NFT:
membership.approveDescription: First, approve the contract to spend 30 USDT on your behalf.
membership.pleaseWaitTransaction: Please wait while the transaction is being processed.
membership.usdtApproved: USDT approved! Now mint your Pro NFT.
membership.membershipActive1Year: Your membership is now active for 1 year.
membership.passwordRequiredApprove: Your password is required to sign the USDT approval transaction.
membership.passwordRequiredMint: Your password is required to sign the NFT mint transaction.
membership.appPasswordRequired: Your app password is required to perform transaction operations.
membership.deviceDescription: Your USB device has a unique ID that can be bound to NFT memberships for hardware-level security.
membership.unlockHint: Enter your app password to view device details and membership bindings.
membership.bindingTipMessage: You own Pro NFTs but haven't bound them to this device yet.
membership.bindingTipDescription: Binding NFTs to your USB device adds hardware-level security and prevents multi-device sharing.
membership.createWalletFirst: Create a wallet first to get your BSC address.
membership.insufficientUsdt: Insufficient USDT balance. Please ensure you have at least 5 USDT (testnet) or 30 USDT (mainnet) in your wallet.
membership.usdtAllowanceNotSet: USDT allowance not set. Please approve USDT spending first.
membership.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Please check your USDT and BNB balance.
membership.usdtApprovalRequired: USDT approval required. Please approve the contract to spend your USDT.
membership.gasExceeds: Transaction requires more gas than allowed. Please try again.
membership.nonceConflict: Transaction nonce conflict. Please wait a moment and try again.

usb.noUsbDetected: No USB drives detected. Please insert a USB drive.
usb.insertUsb: Please insert a USB drive to continue

security.passphraseHint: Advanced feature: Adds an extra word to your mnemonic for additional security
security.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
security.passwordHint: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number
security.passphraseOptional: Leave empty if not using passphrase
security.walletEncrypted: Your wallet will be encrypted with your password
security.mnemonicNotice: You will receive a mnemonic phrase - write it down and keep it safe
security.mnemonicWarning: Without your mnemonic, you cannot recover your wallet
security.passphraseImportWarning: If your original wallet used a passphrase, you must enter the exact same passphrase here.

mnemonic.mnemonicWarning: Never share your mnemonic phrase with anyone. Anyone with this phrase can access your funds.
mnemonic.backupWarning: Make sure to backup your mnemonic phrase in a safe place.
mnemonic.enterRecoveryPhrase: Enter your 12 or 24 word recovery phrase...
mnemonic.enterBip39Hint: Enter your BIP39 mnemonic phrase (12 or 24 words, space-separated)

errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters long
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.mnemonicInvalidWords: Mnemonic contains invalid words. Please check your phrase.
validation.mnemonicInvalidChecksum: Invalid mnemonic checksum. Please verify your recovery phrase.
validation.mnemonicWordCountError: Mnemonic must be 12 or 24 words (you entered {{count}} words)
validation.walletNameTooLong: Wallet name must be 50 characters or less
validation.passphraseCannotBeEmpty: BIP39 passphrase cannot be empty when enabled

settings.settingsDescription: Manage your application settings and preferences
settings.membershipDescription: View membership status and set primary verification address
settings.apiSettingsDescription: Configure blockchain API providers (Alchemy, Infura, QuickNode)

provider.title: API Provider Settings
provider.description: Configure blockchain API providers (Alchemy, Infura, QuickNode) to enable balance queries, fee estimation, and transaction broadcasting. For token swap functionality, add your 1inch API key.
provider.apiKeyHint: Get your API key from the provider's dashboard
provider.priorityHint: Lower numbers = higher priority (1 is highest)
provider.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one to get started!
provider.alchemyHint: Blockchain API provider for ETH, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base. Get free API key at alchemy.com
provider.noderealHint: Blockchain API provider for BSC. Get free API key at dashboard.nodereal.io
provider.oneinchHint: DEX aggregator for token swaps. Get API key at portal.1inch.dev

walletDetail.unlockDescription: Enter your password to view token balances and manage assets
walletDetail.passphraseDescription: This wallet uses a BIP39 passphrase (25th word).
walletDetail.passphraseCaseSensitive: The passphrase is case-sensitive and used during wallet creation.
walletDetail.noTokensFound: No tokens found in this wallet
walletDetail.defiDescription: View your DeFi positions, staking, and lending protocols
walletDetail.nftDescription: Browse and manage your NFT collection
walletDetail.approvalsDescription: Review and revoke token approvals for security
walletDetail.noAddressesLoaded: No addresses loaded. Please unlock the wallet first.
walletDetail.disclaimerText: These addresses are derived using standard BIP-44 paths but have NOT been fully verified for compatibility with each blockchain's native wallet format. Use at your own risk. We recommend verifying addresses with official tools before depositing significant funds.
walletDetail.disclaimerFuture: Full transaction support for these chains is planned for future releases.
walletDetail.noEvmAddress: No EVM address found. Transaction history requires an Ethereum-compatible address (0x...).
walletDetail.noTokensToSend: No tokens with balance available to send. Please load your token balances first.
walletDetail.noTokensToSwap: No tokens with balance available to swap. Please load your token balances first.
walletDetail.invalidPassphrase: Invalid passphrase. The derived address does not match your wallet address.
walletDetail.noEthForStaking: You need ETH on Ethereum mainnet to stake
walletDetail.noAssetsForStaking: You need ETH, BNB, or MATIC with balance to stake

appUnlock.title: ArcSign
appUnlock.subtitle: Secure Cold Wallet Management
appUnlock.welcomeDescription: Create a master password to protect your wallet configuration and API settings. This password will be required each time you start the application.
appUnlock.securityNote1: This password encrypts your app configuration (app_config.enc)
appUnlock.securityNote2: Your wallet mnemonics are separately encrypted with individual wallet passwords
appUnlock.securityNote3: All data is stored on your USB drive using AES-256-GCM encryption
appUnlock.unlockDescription: Enter your master password to access your wallets and settings.
appUnlock.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.title: ArcSign Dashboard
dashboard.noUsbDetected: No USB drive detected. Please insert a USB drive.
dashboard.noUsbForProviders: No USB drive detected. Please insert a USB drive to configure providers.
dashboard.createFirstWalletDesc: Create your first wallet to get started with ArcSign.
dashboard.walletLockedTitle: Wallet locked - upgrade membership to unlock
dashboard.enterPasswordDesc: Enter your password to unlock and view the addresses for this wallet.
dashboard.loggedOutInactivity: You have been logged out due to inactivity.
dashboard.noWalletForAddress: No wallet found for the specified address

deleteWallet.title: Delete Wallet
deleteWallet.warningCannotUndo: Warning: This action cannot be undone!
deleteWallet.aboutToDelete: You are about to permanently delete:
deleteWallet.backupMnemonic: Make sure you have backed up your mnemonic phrase
deleteWallet.verifyNoAssets: Verify you don't have any assets in this wallet
deleteWallet.dataWillBeDeleted: All wallet data will be permanently deleted

libraryCrash.title: Critical Library Error
libraryCrash.message: The wallet library encountered a critical error and stopped working. Your data is safe, but you'll need to reload the application.
libraryCrash.helpText: If this error persists, please contact support with the technical details above.

inactivity.title: Inactivity Detected
inactivity.logoutIn: You will be automatically logged out in
inactivity.needPassword: You will need to re-enter your password to continue. All sensitive data will be cleared from memory when you are logged out.

mnemonic.title: Backup Your Mnemonic Phrase
mnemonic.writeDown: Write down these words in order on paper
mnemonic.storeSecurely: Store the paper in a secure location
mnemonic.neverShare: Never share your mnemonic with anyone
mnemonic.cannotRecover: You cannot recover your wallet without this mnemonic
mnemonic.screenshotProtection: Screenshot protection is enabled - this window cannot be captured
mnemonic.autoCloseIn: This screen will close automatically in
mnemonic.clipboardWarning: Warning: Clipboard will be cleared after 30 seconds for security
mnemonic.beforeContinuing: Before continuing, confirm that you have:
mnemonic.writtenAllWords: Written down all {{count}} words in order
mnemonic.storedBackup: Stored the backup in a secure location
mnemonic.verifiedSpelling: Verified the spelling of each word
mnemonic.confirmBackedUp: I Have Backed Up My Mnemonic
mnemonic.buttonEnableNotice: Button will be enabled in 5 seconds to prevent accidental clicks

swap.title: Swap Tokens
swap.chooseAssetToSwap: Choose which asset you want to swap from
swap.noTokensForSwap: No tokens available for swap on supported chains
swap.supportedChains: Supported: Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, BNB Chain
swap.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, symbol, or address...
swap.approveDescription: To swap {{symbol}}, you need to approve the DEX router to spend your tokens.
swap.unlimitedWarning: Unlimited approval allows the DEX to spend all your {{symbol}}. This is convenient but carries higher risk if the DEX is compromised.
swap.signApprovalDescription: Sign the approval transaction to allow the DEX router to spend your {{symbol}}.
swap.typicallyTakes: This typically takes 15-60 seconds depending on network congestion.
swap.pleaseWait: Please wait while we prepare your transaction.
swap.pleaseWaitSigning: Please wait while we sign your swap transaction
swap.submittingToBlockchain: Submitting your swap to the blockchain...
swap.swapSubmittedDescription: Your swap transaction has been submitted to the network.
swap.errorOccurred: An error occurred during the swap
swap.missingTokenOrQuote: Missing token, quote, or swap transaction data
swap.approvalTimeout: Approval transaction confirmation timeout. Please check the transaction status manually.

staking.selectStakingOptionDesc: Browse all available staking options. APY rates are fetched in real-time.
staking.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Please deposit more tokens to continue.
staking.selectAssetDesc: Choose which asset you want to stake
staking.depositAssetsToStake: Deposit ETH, BNB, or MATIC to start staking
staking.selectProtocolDesc: Choose a verified staking protocol to stake your ETH
staking.needEthOnMainnet: You need ETH on Ethereum mainnet to stake
staking.stETHExplanation: stETH is a liquid staking token that automatically accrues staking rewards over time. You can use or trade your stETH in DeFi protocols at any time.
staking.liquidStakingExplanation: {{outputToken}} is a liquid staking token that automatically accrues staking rewards over time. You can use or trade your {{outputToken}} in DeFi protocols at any time.
staking.enterPasswordDesc: Enter your wallet password to sign the staking transaction
staking.pleaseWait: Please wait, your transaction is being processed
staking.stakingSuccessDesc: You have successfully staked {{amount}} {{symbol}} and will receive {{token}}
